steps.t: The first bag of pipe-weed is on the table. You should get some pipe-weed from the first bag.
The second bag of pipe-weed is on the table. You should get some pipe-weed from the second bag.
Use the pipe you were given to sample the second pouch of pipe-weed.
The third pouch is on the counter. You should take a sample of pipe-weed from the third pipe-weed pouch.
Use the pipe to sample the third pipe-weed blend.
Blossom Gamgee is at the Pipe-weed House on the Northcotton Farm. Blossom Gamgee will want to know what you thought of the pipe-weed blends.
